fronts.title: Acoustic Environment × Soundscape Perception (Soundscape)
fronts.description: Research front: Soundscape Theory studies investigating Acoustic Environment effects on Soundscape Perception.
open_questions: What acoustic thresholds reliably distinguish restorative from masking soundscape effects?

fronts.title: Nature & Biophilia × Wellbeing (Biophilia)
fronts.description: Research front: Biophilia Hypothesis studies investigating Nature & Biophilia effects on Wellbeing.
open_questions: Is dose-response relationship with nature exposure monotonic or threshold-gated?

fronts.title: Luminous Environment × Physiological Response (Circadian)
fronts.description: Research front: Circadian Lighting studies investigating Luminous Environment effects on Physiological Response.
open_questions: What is the mechanistic pathway linking environmental stimulus to physiological response?
What spectral quality and dose parameters produce reliable circadian entrainment effects?
